tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting prediabetes or impaired glucose tolerance. Leukocytes are slightly decreased, which may indicate mild leukopenia but could be benign if asymptomatic. Platelet distribution width is elevated, possibly reflecting increased platelet size variability, but platelet count is normal. Renal function, electrolytes, and red cell indices are within normal limits. No acute abnormalities detected; recommend monitoring glucose metabolism and leukocyte trends.
